name: Pineapple Freeze
recipeInstructions:
1. Place unopened can of pineapple in freezer until solidly frozen.
2. Remove the can from the freezer.
3. Place under hot running water for 30 seconds to loosen the can lid.
4. Carefully remove the can lid.
5. Open the can and transfer the crushed pineapple into a blender.
6. Blend half of the crushed pineapple at a time until smooth and slushy consistency is reached.
7. Repeat blending until all the crushed pineapple has been processed.
